entities.name: SOIL INSECTS
entities.description: Insects that inhabit the soil in groundnut fields

entities.name: WHITE GRUBS
entities.description: Scarabaeid larvae that are predominant soil insects

entities.name: CROP YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area

entities.name: TERMITES
entities.description: Soil insects that cause damage associated with drought

entities.name: POD BORERS
entities.description: Soil insects including elaterids, tenebrionids, doryline ants and millipedes

entities.name: HILDA PATRUELIS
entities.description: An insect encountered in high densities with early sowing

entities.name: EARLY SOWING
entities.description: The practice of sowing crops too early in the season

entities.name: INTENSIVE AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural practice characterized by high input and intensity

entities.name: HIGH RAINFALL
entities.description: Rainfall exceeding 1000 mm per year

entities.name: SANDY OR LOAMY SOILS
entities.description: Soil types where white grubs are likely to be encountered

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A period of abnormally dry weather

entities.name: INSECT PEST MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Strategies to control insect pests in crops

entities.name: INSECTICIDES
entities.description: Chemical substances used to kill insects

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A crop grown preceding groundnut

entities.name: SEED-OIL CONTAMINATION
entities.description: Contamination of seed oil due to insecticide use

entities.name: FALLOWING
entities.description: Leaving land unseeded for a period to restore fertility or control pests

entities.name: CLEANSING CROPS
entities.description: Economically viable crops used to cleanse the soil of pests

entities.name: FOLIAGE FEEDERS
entities.description: Insects that feed on the foliage of the crop

entities.name: APHIS CRACCIVORA
entities.description: An insect vector of the groundnut rosette virus

entities.name: GROUNDNUT ROSETTE VIRUS
entities.description: A virus affecting groundnut crops

entities.name: NATURAL PROCESSES
entities.description: Biological or environmental processes that control pests

entities.name: CASH GENERATION
entities.description: The ability of crops to generate income for farmers

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL INPUTS
entities.description: Resources like seeds and fertilizers needed for crop production
